commands.review_summary:
The PR adds configured `/model` choices in the shared command registry and adjusts Discord and Telegram native command handling/tests so Slack can render model picks while Discord keeps its model picker and Telegram falls back when callbacks exceed limits.

PR surface: Source +83, Tests +232. Total +315 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a feature PR. Source inspection shows current main lacks `/model` menu choices, while the PR head adds them through the shared registry and channel handling.
